title: High Borosilicate Glass Measuring Cup Set-V-Shaped Spout，Includes 60ml(2OZ), 120ml(4OZ), and 250ml(8OZ) Glass Measuring Beaker for Kitchen or Restaurant, Easy to Read
description:
About this item
High Borosilicate Glass Measuring Cup Set,Includes 60ml(2OZ), 120ml(4OZ), and 250ml (8OZ)
Class a & glass science measuring beaker made of high quality 3.3 borosilicate.Apply to Electromagnetic Oven，Gas stove, Microwave, Electric Ceramic stove, Oven and Refrigerator.
Wide mouth design of the cup is easy to clean. V-shaped spout, Liquids can be pouring straight for easy to drainage.
The scale is more accurate.We carefully measured the ACTUAL VOLUME/CAPACITY of the glass measuring cup to make it clearly for our valued customers like you, Make the scale error controlled within ±0.5%
Dishwasher safe, Most chemical liquids, such as acids and bases can be placed.5 different measurement scales, including Teaspoons, Tablespoons, Fluid Ounces, Millilters and Cup
reviews_5s:
This measuring cup set has been an excellent addition to my kitchen. These measuring cups are fantastic for precise measurements, especially when dealing with odd quantities in cooking and baking. The clear, easy-to-read markings ensure accuracy, and the V-shaped spout allows for a smooth, drip-free pour every time.

One of the standout features is the high-quality borosilicate glass, which is durable and heat-resistant, making it perfect for both hot and cold ingredients. The variety of sizes in the set is incredibly useful for different recipes, and I find myself reaching for these cups more often than any others I own.

However, one thing to note is that it's best not to stack them when storing. I made the mistake once, and they got stuck together. To avoid this, I now store them side by side in my cupboard.

Overall, this measuring cup set is a must-have for anyone who loves to cook or bake. The accuracy, durability, and thoughtful design make it a valuable kitchen tool. Highly recommended!We were tired to converting ounces to Ml and back so these are really handy. They are also easy to store in a drawer. They, do seem to be rather fragile so we have our fingers crossed they'll not get broken too easily.Get accurate measurements especially for small quantities of lemon, lime and simple syrup. Great quality and readabilityA lot thicker glass than expectedThis set makes it easy to get accurate quantity measurements for small quantities. Bigger cups are less accurate. The glass (instead of plastic) means it is more durable, and won't melt at mild heating conditions.Many recipes have different ways of measuring ingredients and I am not well-versed in the metric system. So when I saw these three sized measuring cups, in glass, I was a static! I can now measure any amount that the recipe calls for in the metric measurements. I’m very pleased with them, they’re very easy to read. They’re very easy to wash simply rinse them out and dry them. And they’re so easy to use they fit in your hand Perfectly. I’m very happy with my three new measuring cups. They also have ounces as well as milliliters and liters and all the measurements that you need so it takes the guest Work and May use my calculator how to figure it out. So I’m very happy with these and I highly recommend them.Great size, easy to read markings.They’re ok- measure liquidsHappy to haveI like the measuring increments on the side and the pouring spouts.
Perfect for martinis.
reviews_1s:
I don’t know how this product got so many high ratings, it’s cheap and inferior. The picture shows what the only remaining beaker of the three delivered on October 14, looks like after 29 days in the kitchen. The red paint pigment is gone, leaving light white markings that are difficult to see. And, the glass is very thin, think wine glass thin. These are not dishwasher safe and are very delicate. I would not buy this again, nor recommend it to anyone.Stored the three measuring cups Russian doll style. I may have cracked the larger cup when I placed smaller cups inside the larger.
Too thin.
I expected an indestructible Pyrex glass.The product is extremely cheaply made. It’s the cheapest possible glass quality that you can ever get. If you touch them too hard, I think they would burst and break. Very disappointing. The size is fine, but the quality is almost scary to use it because that’s how fragile they are. Anyway, would never recommend it.Never washed in a dishwasher, only ever used cold water to rinse, it was used only for measuring dry goods. Went to grab it today and the bottom just fell off, very odd, must have had a structural weakness that was developing overtime.When I was washing them by hand before use one broke. I think they’re very fragile. I wouldn’t recommend purchasing just for that reason. Not durable.Absolutely awful! Box even says it contains an easy to read measuring beaker. The markings are clear and can barely be seen when held up to bright LED lights. Even coffee doesn’t show the markings. Totally worthless piece of junk! The whole reason I gave away my 50 year old pyrex cups was do to paint fading beyond ease to read.The glass is extremely thin as others have stated. One of them has a bubble in the glass as well, so I'm fairly certain it'll break very soon. Saving the box for the inevitable.After we put it through the dishwasher once the markings faded significantly. After the second time they were pretty much gone. VERY disappointing.I’ve had this thing for about a month and all of the measurements have washed completely off. Do not purchase.Maybe I got a dud set, but all three of mine were broken within the first hour I had them. All I did was wash them with cool water, and each one in turn cracked, then chunks fell out of the bottom, and the water in them ran out onto the counter. Possibly the worst purchase I've ever made on Amazon, and that's saying something!
